purpose: Mutation of Env05 with the blocking permission boundary removed
description: Alice can still assume devops and devops can still assume admin, but the permission boundary from Env05 is removed. IAMScope should now emit validated admin reachability for alice -> admin.

expected_semantic_delta.intended_local_change: Remove only the permission boundary that prevented env05-devops from using sts:AssumeRole on the admin role.

ground_truth.reasoning: Alice can assume devops, devops can assume admin, and the admin role remains admin-equivalent. Removing the boundary restores the second hop instead of blocking it.

assume_role_chain_observation.note: The harness logs assume_role_chain counts but does not fail if the current reasoner omits a validated chain finding for this positive two-hop path.

benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not yet machine-score the pairwise delta against Env05.
It does not prove broader two-hop positive-path coverage beyond this narrow mutation case.
